features: 8 SHEETS OF PREMIUM TISSUE – Includes 4 gold metallic sheets and 4 printed woodland sheets with festive wildlife design
GENEROUS SIZE – Each sheet measures 50 x 70 cm, ideal for wrapping presents, lining gift bags or crafting
FSC MIX PAPER – Eco-friendly 17gsm paper that supports responsible forestry
FESTIVE DESIGN – Features deer, foxes, robins and winter greenery in a detailed Christmas theme
PERFECT FOR WRAPPING – Adds an elegant finishing touch to Christmas gifts, hampers and decorations
description: Add a touch of festive elegance to your gifts with the Eurowrap Woodland 8 Sheet Tissue Paper. This pack includes four plain gold metallic sheets and four beautifully printed woodland-themed sheets featuring deer, foxes, robins, and festive foliage. Each sheet measures 50 x 70 cm and is made from lightweight 17gsm FSC Mix paper, ensuring both style and sustainability. Perfect for lining gift bags, wrapping delicate presents, or adding decorative layers to hampers. The paper comes in packaging with a die-cut window for easy viewing, and a lip seal with an easy-peel sticker for quick resealing.
